conversations.content: Today we studied the Northrend Allied Forces Icecrown Citadel Anti-Infiltration Decree. If Scourge undead plague spores are detected...
Undead plague spores? That's extremely dangerous! How do you respond?
then release a Holy Light Purification Barrier, then incinerate the contaminated armor.
Purify first then burn armor — cut off transmission! Any other threats?
If the giant war horn of the Vrykul is heard blaring, then fire Dalaran arcane artillery, then awaken the Silver Hand Crusaders to charge.
Vrykul horn triggers arcane artillery plus crusader charge — fierce! Is there a third scenario?
If sensing an omen of Val'kyr reaping souls, then hurl runic chains, then dispel the soul vortex.
Runic chains to lock Val'kyr, then dispel soul vortex — nice! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?

If any of the above situations occurs, the highest-level Frostmourne Alert must be sounded, all forces retreat to the core positions of their respective strongholds, and activate the Titan Shield Barrier.

think: Northrend Allied Forces Icecrown Citadel Anti-Infiltration Decree: three threats with respective responses: Scourge plague spores → Holy Light Purification Barrier + incinerate armor; Vrykul war horn → Dalaran arcane artillery + Silver Hand charge; Val'kyr soul-reaping omen → runic chains + dispel soul vortex. Any of the above → sound Frostmourne Alert + all forces retreat to core positions + activate Titan Shield Barrier.
memory: Northrend Allied Forces Icecrown Citadel Anti-Infiltration Decree: If Scourge undead plague spores are detected, then release a Holy Light Purification Barrier, then incinerate the contaminated armor; if the giant war horn of the Vrykul is heard blaring, then fire Dalaran arcane artillery, then awaken the Silver Hand Crusaders to charge; if sensing an omen of Val'kyr reaping souls, then hurl runic chains, then dispel the soul vortex; if any of the above situations occurs, the highest-level Frostmourne Alert must be sounded, all forces retreat to the core positions of their respective strongholds, and activate the Titan Shield Barrier.
